metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_571
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Spine morphology of medium spiny neurons in striatal sections obtained from WAVE1-/- mice revealed that WAVE1-/- neurons displayed a significant reduction in class 1 spines (stubby type), class 2 spines (comprised of mature spines with a relatively large head and a short neck) and class 3 spines (thin spines) and showed a relatively high density of class 4 protrusions, or filopodia.

Furthermore WAVE1 RNAi in primary hippocampal neurons resulted in a decrease in the density of class 2 spines and an increase in filopodia.

30/8/2017 Pim
- Fig.1 WAVE1 co-ips with actin
- Fig.2 Inhibition of Arp2/3-complex-mediated actin polymerization by phosphorylation of WAVE1.. Experimental description: male C57BL/6 mice (6-8 weeks old)

30/8/2017 Pim
- Overexpressed WAVE1 was human species: "Human WAVE1 cDNA28 was subcloned into pCMV-Myc (BD)"
